text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 231 

RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 

LABEL: Race and Ethnicity Constructed Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A constructed variable indicating the beneficiary’s race and ethnicity; most recent in the calendar and 
the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 

LONG NAME: RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic
